nasb.text: far above all rule and authority and power and dominion, and every name that is named, not only in this age but also in the one to come.

esv.text: far above all rule and authority and power and dominion, and above every name that is named, not only in this age but also in the one to come.

cnv.text: 遠超過一切執政的、掌權的、有能的、作主的，和今生來世所能舉出的一切名銜。

ccb.text: 远远超越今生永世所有执政的、掌权的、有能力的、做主宰的和一切的权势。

csbs.text: 远远高过一切统治的、掌权的、有势力的、有主权的，和一切被称的名号，不仅在这世代，而且也在那将要来临的世代。
